_comment: M2-T004 contract-1.2.0 exemplar (SYNTHETIC per README convention: source_id 'test-fixture-synthetic'; BBL is the research-doc official 120 Broadway BBL). Models the S2 dimension-independence story: the source record is COMPLETE for the feasibility basis while geometry is MISSING - two independent truths reported simultaneously, never collapsed. Digests are real canonical-json-1 values recomputable from the shown original_value and the synthetic response [{"bbl":"1000477501.00000000","lotarea":"23121","version":"26v1"}].

missing_inputs.reason: column absent from the synthetic record; outside the feasibility-relevant completeness basis

reproducibility.coverage_policy: coverage_status is derived only from review status and conflict/drift state; connector confidence is never mapped to a coverage label (PRD section 12).
reproducibility.digest_canonicalization: canonical-json-1: a digest is 'sha256:' + lowercase-hex SHA-256 of the UTF-8 encoding of the canonical JSON serialization of the PARSED value. Canonical serialization: object keys sorted lexicographically by Unicode code point; separators ',' and ':' with no insignificant whitespace; non-ASCII characters preserved as-is (not escaped); no Unicode normalization applied; numbers serialized by Python json.dumps defaults (integers verbatim, floats shortest-repr).

status_dimensions.policy: status_dimensions are derived deterministically and independently; dimensions the platform cannot yet compute are declared not_computed, never inferred (M2-T004 exemplar policy text).
